ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: 70 % Schweinefleisch, 20 % Zwiebeln, 10 % Marinade (Rapsöl, Speisesenf (Trinkwasser, Senfsaaten, Branntweinessig, Speisesalz, Gewürze), Speisesalz, Gewürze (Curry, Kurkuma, Ingwer, Paprika, Chilli, Knoblauch,) Rapsfett gehärtet, Säureregulator: Natriumacetate; Kräuter (Thymian, Petersilie, Rosmarin)).
